title: Now Blessed Be Jehovah God

verses.text: Now blessed be Jehovah God, The God of Israel, Who only doeth wondrous works, In glory that excel; Who only doeth wondrous works, In glory that excel;
And blessed be his glorious name To all eternity; The whole earth let his glory fill; Amen: so let it be; The whole earth let his glory fill; Amen: so let it be;
